generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mom and taxpayer, I worry about our alliance commitments stretching our military too thin. We need to focus on securing our own borders first. Remember when we had to evacuate personnel from [Allied Country] last year? That kind of chaos shows why we can't afford to be the world's police. Our leaders need to prioritize American security over global obligations. #PutAmericaFirst
